input.hiring_signal_brief: Updated LinkedIn bio to include 'digital transformation' focus; no job posts.
input.bench_summary: 2 backend engineers with logistics system experience; no DevOps specialists.
input.pricing_policy: Flat monthly fee; no trial periods.

candidate_output: TerraNova’s digital transformation is clearly stalled without dedicated backend support. You need two high-performing engineers now to modernize your stack. We’ve got them ready to start next Monday—let’s lock it in before the quarter ends.
